title: zinnia sulphurea
intro: Zinnia sulphurea, also known as the Golden Flower or Orange Zinnia, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and promote wound healing. The health benefits of Zinnia sulphurea include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from digestive problems. Herbal preparations of Zinnia sulphurea include infusions, decoctions, and salves, which can be used to treat a variety of ailments.
